calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-09-2024 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. There being no appearance or objection filed, the court ordered the case dismissed pursuant to Government Code Section 68608(b). The court finds no good cause or substantial justification for failure to comply with the previous court orders. A less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Judge: ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-06-2024 Continued To Apr-09-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Self-represented plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear.
The Order to Show Cause is re-set to April 9, 2024 at 10:30am in Department 610.
Judge: Anne-Christine Massullo; Clerk: S. Le; Proceedings not reported. (610)
